creator: todd@toddblum.org
text:
This has happened again, 40 days since previously.  I've noticed from the
logs that immediately before both crashes it was establishing a VPN tunnel
with a Netgear ProSafe VPN FVS114 Firewall, with tunnel settings on both
sides being AES128/SHA1, with both Phase 1 and Phase 2 having 28800
lifetimes.
